node.data: {"M6800":{"lit":"պա<lb xml:id=\"l103937582\" facs=\"#z103937582\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>յծառացուցանելով","line":{"facs":"#z103937581","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103937581","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6800-203b"},"n":"պայծառացուցանելով"},"M1475":{"lit":"պայծառացուցա<lb xml:id=\"l104136685\" facs=\"#z104136685\" n=\"11\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>նելով","line":{"facs":"#z104136684","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104136684","n":"10"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"1475-228a"},"n":"պայծառացուցանելով"}}
